query:
SELECT
                o.id,
                o.name,
                o.slug,
                COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) AS "device_count!",
                COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS "user_count!"
            FROM organizations o
            LEFT JOIN devices d ON d.org_id = o.id
            LEFT JOIN users u ON u.org_id = o.id
            WHERE o.id = $1
            GROUP BY o.id
